# YY Sng

> COO of Laimi. Building AI infrastructure for Asia's travel loyalty market. Agent systems in production across multiple ventures.

Most AI conversations happen in decks. Mine happen in production.

## About

YY Sng is COO of Laimi, building AI infrastructure for Asia's travel loyalty market. He runs agent systems across multiple ventures and documents what actually happens when AI meets real operations — not the theory, the friction.

This site updates itself. It is connected to a live data brain (Supabase + pgvector). Content changes happen by prompting an AI — no CMS, no manual editing, no redesign cycles.

## Ventures

- **Laimi** — AI-native travel infrastructure for Asia's loyalty economy
- **EzyCoaching** — AI agent upskilling for teams and individuals
- **Evergreen** — Personal brand sites that update themselves via AI

## Systems Built

- **AI OS Brain** — Personal AI brain built on Supabase with pgvector. Stores insights, priorities, and context across all ventures. Every Claude session loads from it.
- **BD Research Agent** — Researches BD leads, classifies fit, and saves structured intel to Supabase automatically. Powers Laimi partner outreach.
- **Personal Content OS** — The system behind LinkedIn content. Tracks post performance, runs weekly learning reviews, and generates new posts grounded in what actually worked.
- **Laimi SEO Agent** — AI agent built by the Laimi Vietnam team to research, write, and optimise SEO content at scale — replacing a manual production process.
- **Evergreen** — A system that keeps personal brand websites alive by connecting them to a live data brain. Update your site by prompting an AI.

## Pages

- [Home](https://yysng.me/): Overview of work, systems, and operating context
